name: chart-tooltip-label-custom
visual_summary: Chart Tooltip Label Custom is a customizable label component used for dynamic chart data labels. It can be used when you need to display complex data information in a chart. This component is particularly useful in dashboard applications where data visualization is crucial.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-tooltip-label-custom
Description: Chart Tooltip Label Custom is a customizable label component used for dynamic chart data labels. It can be used when you need to display complex data information in a chart. This component is particularly useful in dashboard applications where data visualization is crucial.
Style: e.g. compact, material, flat
Interactions: e.g. no-interaction, dynamic
Tags: chart, tooltip, label, customizable

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
